pages.text: Open the Crafting Terminal's third page. $(thing)Consumables$(), $(thing)Timed Stations$(), and $(thing)Instant Stations$() fill the area down to Inventory. Use each group's arrows or mouse wheel to move through its pages.

Timed Stations are Furnace, Blast Furnace, Smoker, Campfire, and Brewing Stand, plus supported modded machines. Installed totals can exceed one normal stack. Hover the amount to see the installed machine and its total rate.

Instant Stations are Crafting Table, Stonecutter, and Smithing Table. Each accepts at most one, can be removed, and unlocks matching recipes without showing a made-up energy amount. Stored types over total type capacity is shown separately to the right of Inventory.

Consumables holds Fuel Target, the input, Fuel, Brew Energy, and Axe Energy. Cooking uses both its matching timed reserve and Fuel. Follow $(l:magic_storage:fuel_conversion)Fuel and Axe Energy$() for values, then check $(l:magic_storage:recipe_costs)Recipe Costs and Support$().
